content.en:
In the following days, the Tempest Chamber of Commerce successively returned a lot of resources and industries to Luoxia Pavilion.

And Luo Xia Pavilion's move was to directly sell most of these properties, and they were all sold at low prices to some forces that were not weaker than the Tempest Chamber of Commerce.

This is also a helpless move, because Luo Xia Pavilion knows very well that with their current strength, they can't hold it at all, and there is no strong person to guard these industries, and if they forcibly take it back, they will only be snatched away by other forces.

Rather than that, it is better to sell it directly to the reputable forces in exchange for a large amount of resources!

And after selling these properties, Luo Xia Pavilion's wealth skyrocketed all of a sudden.

......

Luoxia Court Headquarters.

The oath of agreement signed by Ye Tian and Luo Xia Pavilion was lifted by Luo Xia Pavilion on his own initiative.

From today onwards, Ye Tian was no longer bound by the oath of Luoxia Pavilion.

Moreover, Luo Xia Pavilion also gave Ye Tian the light of Luo Xia completely, the kind that was not bound by the oath.

In this way, Ye Tian can teach Luo Xia's light to the human race.

"Ye Tian, will you leave Luoxia Pavilion next?"

Luo Wushuang asked nervously.

She naturally didn't want Ye Tian to leave in her heart, after all, such a strong man sitting in Luoxia Pavilion would undoubtedly make Luoxia Pavilion not threatened by other forces, and he could solve a lot of troubles.

Once Ye Tian leaves, Luoxia Pavilion will still be the same as before, but with more wealth and less great enemies like the Tempest Chamber of Commerce, but there may still be a second great enemy.

"Not leaving here yet!"

Ye Tian said.

Hearing this, Luo Wushuang breathed a sigh of relief.

In fact, Ye Tian didn't know where to go next, so it was better to stay in Luoxia Pavilion first.

No matter how much Luoxia Pavilion declines, at least it is a place to stay, and you can also get some information through Luoxia Pavilion, learn about the latest information, and so on.

Therefore, there was no need for him to leave Luoxia Pavilion.

......

Human domain.

Ye Tian called his wife and children over.

"Father!"

"Husband!"

They shouted.

Ye Tian said: "I have obtained an Eternal Dao Secret Technique, which can allow you to quickly carry out Eternal Dao Transformation, so I will teach it to you now!"

Immediately, he directly taught them the light of Luoxia.

When they got the light of Luoxia, they were excited.

With Luoxia's Light, they at least didn't need to worry about progress before they became the Eternal Immortal Dao Late Stage Realm.

However, if you want to truly break through to the late stage of the Eternal Dao realm, you still need to comprehend the rules of the Eternal Sequence Dao.

After all, without the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, it would be impossible to truly utilize the light of Luoxia.

In fact, before comprehending the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, he could only simulate the light of Luoxia with the realm of the first sequence of Supreme Dao rules, which could probably exert one percent of the power of Luoxia's light.

Of course, even if he only exerted one percent of his power, he was many times faster than his usual cultivation of Eternal Dao.

If you add mythical spiritual objects, the cultivation speed will be even faster.

After Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue obtained the light of Luoxia, they went to cultivate.

With the mythical spiritual objects provided by Ye Tian, their cultivation progress will not be too slow.

And Ye Tian is also working hard to cultivate, if before, without the light of Luoxia, the mythical spiritual objects he obtained are estimated to be not enough for him to cultivate to the realm of eternal Taoism, but now it is enough.

The years passed, and before I knew it, millions of years had passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Transformation had been raised to the ninety percent realm, but after reaching the ninety percent realm, it was slightly more difficult to improve.

However, after the years of the 10 million Supreme Dao Era at most, he was sure that he would be able to ascend to the Ten Percent Realm, and then he would have to impact the Eternal Dao Realm.

......

Valley of Myths.

After Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, many replica bodies were already sure to besiege and kill this mythical spirit.

However, he did not kill him.

At the very least, it's a good gatekeeper!

If a creature from the Ancient Realm accidentally breaks into this place, at least the spirit of myths will destroy it.

Therefore, after Ye Tian beat this mythical spirit violently, he did not continue to do anything to it.

Luoxia Court.

At this time, Luo Wushuang was selling a large number of various treasures and exchanging them for ancient coins, just because a large auction was about to start.

And in this auction, it is very likely that there will be a treasure that heals Xinghai's injuries.

Therefore, Luo Wushuang was ready to bid for that treasure at all costs.

And Ye Tian also learned about this auction from Luoxia Pavilion, and he was also a little interested.

But.

Ye Tian didn't have many ancient coins in his hand, and if he wanted to participate in this auction, this ancient coin was not good.

"I've got to get some treasures!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And the mythical spiritual objects, he wants them all himself, and he will definitely not sell them.

However, the Innate Primordial Treasure is available for sale.

In addition, he can also use the Eternal Rule Disc to fuse a high-quality or top-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, which can definitely be sold for a lot of money.

this day.

Ye Tian sent a replica body to the Ancient Realm, sending a large number of innate primordial treasures.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came to find Luo Wushuang.

"Pavilion Master, I have a batch of Innate Origin Treasures in my hands and I want to sell them. "

Ye Tian said.

He didn't know any forces, and it was difficult to sell so many innate primordial treasures for a while, so it was better to find Luo Wushuang.

"Good!"

Luo Wushuang agreed.

But when she saw the innate primordial treasure that Ye Tian took out, she was still shocked, the amount was a bit much!

In the Ancient Kingdom, the price of an Innate Primordial Treasure is estimated to be around 10,000 Ancient Coins, and Ye Tian took out more than 100 Innate Primordial Treasures, which is almost equivalent to more than 3 million Ancient Coins!

Even the current Luoxia Pavilion has taken out more than 10 million ancient coins at most, which is the limit.

However, when he thought of Ye Tian's strength, Luo Wushuang was not surprised.

It is not surprising that such a strong person has so many innate primordial treasures.

In the following days, Luo Wushuang used Luo Xia Pavilion to dispose of these innate primordial treasures, and collected a total of more than 3.2 million ancient coins for Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian is in the ancient kingdom, and he can be regarded as an extremely wealthy eternal Taoist.

A few more years passed, and that auction was about to begin.

......

The capital of the ancient kingdom.

Ye Tian and Luo Wushuang came here, this is the capital of the ancient kingdom, and it is also the most core place.

Here, even the Eternal Dao Realm has a lot, and the Eternal Dao powerhouse can be seen everywhere.

This time, there are not a few Eternal Dao realms participating in the auction.
